_comment: Manifest consumed by Scripts/SessionManagement/archive_paths.py. Successful entries are removed automatically on --apply runs. Add new candidates by appending strings to 'paths'. Use repo-relative POSIX paths.

_review_notes.verification: Each entry was confirmed completed/superseded by reading the source file's status header or by cross-checking Sessions/Implemented_*.md.
convention_kept_as_is: dev_notes/planning/ImplementedSession*.md (legacy logs — kept per project convention)
dev_notes/planning/Roadmap.md (now a HISTORICAL redirect — kept accessible at top of planning/)
dev_notes/planning/TorchIconAudit.md (still useful as the live torch-icon checklist)
icon_audit.md at repo root (live inventory referenced by current sessions)
